desc: reset_state leaves threshold unchanged, so a mutated threshold survives a purported full state reset.
init_data initializes only data and counter, making subsequent processing depend on stale flag, mode, or threshold values from prior use.
All operations mutate a shared global dictionary, creating hidden coupling, order-dependent behavior, poor test isolation, and unsafe concurrent access.
Functions directly index a publicly mutable dictionary without validating required keys or value types, so external mutation can cause runtime exceptions or invalid results.
The mode field is written but never read, creating misleading state with no effect on program behavior.
